title: 3.-Grant Application: California Arts Council Grant ($30,000), for the Civic Arts Grant Program General Operating Support Category

sections.recommendation:
Adopt a Resolution authorizing the City Manager or their designee to submit a grant
application to the California Arts Council (CAC) to receive up to $30,000 for the Civic
Arts grants program (“General Operating Support” category), to accept the grant if
awarded; and to execute any resulting grant agreements. If received, the funds would
be regranted to Berkeley-based nonprofit and fiscally sponsored arts organizations for
general operational support starting in Fiscal Year 2027 (FY27).
sections.fiscal_impacts:
If awarded the grant for FY27, the CAC requires a one-to-one match of City funds. No
additional allocation of funding from the City’s General Fund would be required to
receive this state grant funding. The local match would be met with funds already
allocated for Civic Arts Grants in FY27 which supports two grant categories: General
Operating Support and Individual Artist Project Grants.
sections.current_situation:
Since Fiscal Year 2018, the City of Berkeley has allocated $500,000 to the Civic Arts
grants program annually from the General Fund to distribute arts grants to Berkeley-
based artists and cultural organizations. This allocation of funds has been divided into
two grant programs: Individual Artist Projects (for artists) and General Operating
Support (for arts organizations). With an increased need for funding for Berkeley’s arts
and cultural sector, staff has looked to outside sources for additional funding to re-grant.
If awarded, the state CAC grant funds (of up to $30,000) would be utilized to augment
the General Operating Support Civic Arts grant category, bringing the total amount of
funding to be granted in that category from $450,000 to (up to) $480,000. This would
not impact the portion of the Civic Arts Grant allocation that supports the Individual Artist
Project Grants category ($50,000). A decision on the grant application for $30,000 by
the CAC is anticipated by September of 2025.

Grant Application: California Arts Council General Operating Support Grant CONSENT CALENDAR
June 3, 2025
sections.background:
The Civic Arts Grants have an annual budget of approximately $700,000 from the City's
General Fund (011). Annually, the Civic Arts Grants Program awards funding in three
distinct categories, the General Fund amount allocated to each program is indicated in
parenthesis: 1) Individual Artist Projects ($50,000); 2) Community Festivals (ranges
between a baseline budget of $158,317 to $200,000 per year), and 3) General
Operating Support ($450,000). Each year Civic Arts awards a greater number of
General Operating Support grants utilizing the same budget allocation amount of
$450,000, which results in a decreasing size of individual grant award amounts for
Berkeley’s arts organizations. Additional funding from the CAC will help offset this trend.
ENVIRONMENTAL SUSTAINABILITY AND CLIMATE IMPACTS
There are no environmental sustainability or climate impacts associated with this
recommendation.
sections.rationale:
Accepting state funding from the California Arts Council would help the City accomplish
one of the five goals articulated in the City of Berkeley’s Arts and Culture Plan (2018-
2027) to “Increase Investment in a Vibrant Arts Community, Strengthen and support
Berkeley’s inclusive and culturally rich arts sector by expanding funding and marketing
opportunities for a broader array of arts organizations.” If awarded, the state grant funds
would enable the City of Berkeley to leverage already dedicated local funds to provide
increased support for arts organizations within the City of Berkeley.
sections.alternatives:
None.
CONTACT PERSON
Hilary Amnah, Office of Economic Development, 510-981-7539
sections.attachments:
1: Resolution
Page 2
Page 3 of 3
RESOLUTION NO. ##,###-N.S.
GRANT APPLICATION: REQUESTING $30,000 FROM THE CALIFORNIA ARTS
COUNCIL (CAC) TO SUPPORT ARTS ORGANIZATIONS’ GENERAL OPERATING
SUPPORT IN THE CITY OF BERKELEY BY INCREASING THE CIVIC ARTS GRANTS
PROGRAM FUNDING CATEGORY KNOWN AS GENERAL OPERATING SUPPORT
GRANTS.
WHEREAS, the Arts and Culture Plan for the City of Berkeley (2017-18) includes the goal
of increasing investment in a vibrant arts community by expanding funding and marketing
opportunities for a broader array of arts organizations; and
WHEREAS, the existing General Operating Support Civic Arts grant category supports
the City’s ability to sustain access to arts and cultural programming taking place in
Berkeley; and
WHEREAS, state funding from the California Arts Council is available to government arts
agencies for sub-granting purposes; and
WHEREAS, no additional allocation of funding from the City’s General Fund would be
required to receive this state grant funding; and
WHEREAS, the City will use the existing allocation of Civic Arts grants to meet the
required 1:1 match of $30,000; and
WHEREAS, if received, the CAC grant funds (of up to $30,000) will be utilized to augment
the General Operating Support Civic Arts grant category, bringing the total amount in that
category from $450,000 to (up to) $480,000.
NOW THEREFORE, BE IT RESOLVED by the Council of the City of Berkeley that the
City Manager or their designee is authorized to submit a grant application to the California
Arts Council to receive up to $30,000 for the above purpose; accept the grant if awarded;
and execute any resultant agreements and amendments.
